database_schema.summary: CRM nội bộ + FDIWork public website. CRM: quản lý user, candidate, client, job order. FDIWork: nhà tuyển dụng (employer) đăng tin, ứng viên (application) nộp CV, admin duyệt bài.
database_schema.relationships_explained: CRM: 1 Client có nhiều JobOrders, 1 JobOrder có nhiều Candidate (qua JobCandidate pipeline). FDIWork: 1 Employer có 1 Subscription (gói dịch vụ), 1 Employer đăng nhiều JobPosting, 1 JobPosting nhận nhiều Application. CRM-FDIWork bridge: Employer link Client (1:1 optional), JobPosting link JobOrder (optional), Application link Candidate (khi import).

api_endpoints.explained: FDIWork public: getHomepageData, getPublicJobs, getPublicJobBySlug, getPublicCompanies, getCompanyBySlug, submitApplication
FDIWork employer: login, register, logout, dashboard, company profile, subscription, CRUD job postings (quota check), toggle status, view applicants
CRM admin: approve/reject job postings, manage employer status, assign/renew subscriptions

features: Quản lý Khách hàng (CRUD Client & Contacts)
Quản lý Ứng viên (CRUD, Filter, Notes, CV Upload)
✅ FDIWork Public Website (Phases 01-04: Homepage, Jobs, Companies, Apply)
✅ Employer Auth (Phase 05: JWT login/register, dashboard, company profile, subscription)
✅ Employer Job Management (Phase 06: CRUD jobs, quota check, pause/resume, applicants list)
✅ Admin Moderation (Phase 07: approve/reject tin, manage employers, assign subscriptions, CRM sidebar FDIWork section)
🆕 CRM Integration (Phase 08 PLANNED: CV import from FDIWork applications)
business_rules: Ứng viên mặc định AVAILABLE. Email không bắt buộc nhưng phải chuẩn format.
Bắt buộc gắn Client khi tạo JobOrder. Xóa mềm (isDeleted) cho an toàn.
Employer phải ACTIVE mới đăng nhập được (admin duyệt trước).
JobPosting phải PENDING → admin Approve mới hiển thị trên web.
Employer hết quota (jobsUsed >= jobQuota) → không đăng tin mới.
JobPosting hết hạn (expiresAt < now) → ẩn khỏi danh sách public.
Application form validation: PDF/DOC/DOCX, 5MB max, check duplicate email/phone + job.
Application import vào CRM → tạo Candidate với source = FDIWORK.
Approve job → set publishedAt = now, expiresAt = now + subscription.jobDuration days.
Assign subscription → auto-activate employer nếu status = PENDING.

patterns: Separate auth: CRM = NextAuth, Employer = custom JWT (jose) header cookies
Prisma transactions for complex inserts (job create + quota increment)
Route groups: (auth) = standalone pages, (portal) = sidebar layout
gotchas: Prisma one-to-one relation cần @unique trên FK field
Client-Employer relation cần named relation ('EmployerClient') để tránh ambiguous
proxy.ts startsWith('/employer') match cả '/employers' → phải dùng startsWith('/employer/') hoặc exact match
Route group conflicts: (employer)/login vs nested (auth)/login cần restructure
conventions: CRM color: Indigo, FDIWork color: Teal (#0D9488)
FDIWork route groups: (public) = no auth, (employer)/(auth) = standalone, (employer)/(portal) = sidebar layout

docs_structure.crm: docs/crm/ (BRIEF, DESIGN, design-specs, ideas, mockups, plans, reports)

bugs_fixed: Route group path conflicts ((employer)/login vs nested)
EmployerSidebar logout pattern (server action in form)
